title: Concrete Saints
concept: A warehouse turned into a chapel for people who pray with their feet — brutal, industrial, elegant pressure built from steel and repetition.
statement: Schranz drive and distorted percussion under cinematic tension — dark, mechanical, devotional in its discipline rather than its volume.
visualIdentity: Raw concrete and steel under cold strobe light, smoke catching a single shaft of white, ritual symbols cut from sheet metal.
musicalStyle: Hard techno kick, distorted percussion, schranz drive, industrial textures, dark stabs, metallic impacts, hypnotic loops, aggressive bass, cinematic tension.
